allow: PowerShell(cd "D:\\01 APP\\SHformacio"; $env:VERCEL_TOKEN = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("VERCEL_TOKEN", "Machine"\); if \(-not $env:VERCEL_TOKEN\) { Write-Host "ERROR: VERCEL_TOKEN no trobat"; exit 1 }; Write-Host "Token OK, desplegant a Production..."; vercel deploy --prod --prebuilt --token=$env:VERCEL_TOKEN --yes 2>&1)
